comment: Glass backing. The FRONT (north) face is the reflective surface seen through the frame opening; the reflection quad composites over it. The BACK (south) face is a full oak panel at the cell's rear plane - it is the only geometry drawn there (the frame pieces omit their south faces to defer to it), so nothing z-fights. The side faces stay omitted: they sit at the cell edges coplanar with the proud frame bars' faces and z-fight (silvery vs oak) when viewed edge-on.
